name: Liu Shan

skills.name: Magnetic Barrier
skills.description: Skills deal equal damage to structures and disrupt them, while also recovering Health.

skills.name: Overcharge!
skills.description: Gains a shield and increased Movement Speed while enhancing the next Basic Attack to damage and launch enemies.

skills.name: Robo Smash
skills.description: Inflicts damage and stun on enemies in the target area.

skills.name: Take It for a Spin
skills.description: Unleashes a spinning attack that continuously deals damage to nearby enemies. While spinning, Basic Attacks slow and deal damage to targets.

skillsZh.name: 磁力屏障
skillsZh.description: 劉禪技能可對機關造成等量傷害並回復自身生命值，同時對機關造成干擾效果。

skillsZh.name: 小霸王護盾
skillsZh.description: 開啟護盾增加移速同時強化下次普攻，可對目標造成傷害和擊飛。

skillsZh.name: 機關魔爪
skillsZh.description: 對指定區域敵人造成傷害和暈眩。

skillsZh.name: 暴走貓熊
skillsZh.description: 開啟旋轉攻擊，對周圍敵人持續造成傷害。旋轉期間普攻對目標造成傷害和減速。

tips: Liu Shan (Tank): Tier A — 49.45% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Axe of Torment, Blazing Cape, Frigid Charge.
tipsZh: 劉禪（遊走）：梯度 A，勝率 49.45%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：暗影戰斧、紅蓮斗篷、冰霜衝擊.

patchHistory.detail: "As a tank support, it's Liu Shan's job to take damage in the frontline, while also trying to crowd control enemies. We've reduced his skill cooldowns to improve his performance in both areas."

patchHistory.change: Increased shield from Skill 1 when using defensive equipment.
patchHistory.detail: "We want Liu Shan's survivability to be more connected with his equipment choices."

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「作為坦克輔助，劉禪需要在前排承受傷害，同時嘗試控制對手；我們降低了他的技能冷卻時間，提升這兩項能力。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升1技能在防禦出裝下的護盾
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「我們希望劉禪的生存能力，能夠與出裝選擇有一定的關聯。」

faqs.question: Is Liu Shan good in current season?
faqs.answer: Liu Shan is Tier A Tank with 49.45% win rate, 0.87% pick rate, and 0.09% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Liu Shan build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Axe of Torment, Blazing Cape, Frigid Charge, Cuirass of Savagery, Longnight Guardian, Sage's Sanctuary.

faqs.question: How to counter Liu Shan?
faqs.answer: Pick Li Bai. Strong into Arthur, Augran, Biron.

faqsZh.question: 劉禪 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 劉禪 為 A 梯度，勝率 49.45%、選取 0.87%、禁用 0.09%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 劉禪 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：暗影戰斧、紅蓮斗篷、冰霜衝擊、暴烈之甲、永夜守護、賢者的庇護.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 劉禪？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Li Bai。劉禪 克制 Arthur、Augran、Biron。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Arthur, Augran, Biron. Weak into: Li Bai.

guide.overview: Liu Shan is a Easy Tank (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 49.6% win rate and 0.9% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Liu Shan: Liu Shan's skills deal equal damage to structures and can disrupt them while also recovering Health.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Glacial Buckler, Ominous Premonition, then complete Succubus Cloak, Longnight Guardian. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Liu Shan's Tank kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Overcharge! → Robo Smash → Take It for a Spin → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Take It for a Spin (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Overcharge!, and Take It for a Spin on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Overcharge! → Robo Smash → Take It for a Spin → weave basic attacks

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Liu Shan is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 49.6% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.9% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Liu Shan.
comparisons: Liu Shan vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 1.7% more often globally. Choose Liu Shan when you need Roaming identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Liu Shan vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Dun wins 2.6% more often globally. Choose Liu Shan when you need Roaming identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Liu Shan excels into Arthur, Augran, Biron. Avoid blind picking into Li Bai without team peel.
